title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: self-host LLMs (Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma…) with a single CLI or REST API; macOS/Linux/Windows images included.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official async Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, push models in a few lines.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package offering Ollama LLM & embeddings components.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-web/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for any Ollama model; multi-user, themes, code highlighting.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container files for running Ollama server plus CUDA/ROm drivers; ready docker-compose stacks.

title: ollama-cli (mattw/ollama-cli)
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI with readline, syntax highlighting and conversation persistence.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store; ingest PDFs and chat.

title: ollama-copilot (github-copilot-adapter)
summary: Adapter that exposes Ollama models as a GitHub Copilot compatible server for VS Code.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Native n8n node to call Ollama chat & embeddings inside no-code workflows.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator & OllamaTextEmbedder components.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama4j (ollama-java)
summary: Unofficial Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; sync & async APIs, Android compatible.

title: ollama-rust (ollama-rs)
summary: Community Rust crate wrapping Ollama REST endpoints with tokio/async support.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client library for Ollama with IAsyncEnumerable streaming and DI-friendly setup.

title: ollama-codex (cli coding agent)
summary: Experimental coding agent that uses Ollama models to autocomplete & explain code in the terminal.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings any Ollama model into your server with slash commands.

title: ollama-model-library (awesome-ollama)
summary: Curated list of community-tuned models, tools, tutorials and integrations for Ollama.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir OTP client for Ollama with GenServer-backed process pooling for chat & embeddings.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that exposes Ollama chat in channels/DM with thread support and reaction triggers.
